name: Returnal Line
lore: Rise once more, O sunken city fated for rebirth. Return to us, @3!

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of next battle, gain {STR} equal to 12% of the wielder's ATK. If the current Realm is {Aequor}, the effect changes to "At turn start, there is a (50 + 0.25 * team's Realm Mastery)% chance to gain 1 stack of Tentacle Gathering. Multiple stacks can be gained if the probability exceeds 100%, and the chance doubles in Boss Battles."
